scripts.install:all: cd scripts && npm install && cd ../renderer && npm install
scripts.extract: cd scripts && npx tsx run-eval-multi.ts --step extract
scripts.analyze: cd scripts && npx tsx run-eval-multi.ts --step analyze
scripts.reconstruct: cd scripts && npx tsx run-eval-multi.ts --step reconstruct
scripts.screenshot: cd scripts && npx tsx run-eval-multi.ts --step screenshot
scripts.score: cd scripts && npx tsx run-eval-multi.ts --step score
